3148300.name: Smashshot
3148300.description:
Smashshot is a twin stick shooter with focus on knockback and inspiration from platform fighters. Rack up damage then blast your opponents off the screen

10+ ABILITIES AND WEAPONS

Select two from a foray of abilities and pair them with your favored weapon to cater to different p[aystyles.

ROUGELIKE PVE

Complete a series of objectives leading up to the final stage. Purchase abilities and weapon upgrades along the way. And prove your skill in the final stage and defeat 1 of 5(?) bosses. Can be played alone or in couch co-op with up to 6 players.

ENGAGING PVP

Select a weapon and two abilities, one for utility, and one to knock your enemies away when the time is right. Up to 9 players at a time!
